response:
Of course! Here are the ingredients for a basic salad in a checkbox format.

### The Base (Choose one or a mix)
- [ ] Romaine Lettuce
- [ ] Mixed Greens or Spring Mix
- [ ] Spinach
- [ ] Iceberg Lettuce

### Core Vegetables
- [ ] Tomatoes (cherry, grape, or diced)
- [ ] Cucumber (sliced or diced)
- [ ] Carrots (shredded or sliced)
- [ ] Red Onion (thinly sliced)
- [ ] Bell Peppers (any color, sliced)

### Optional Add-ins
- [ ] Croutons
- [ ] Shredded Cheese (like cheddar or mozzarella)
- [ ] Crumbled Cheese (like feta or blue cheese)
- [ ] Chickpeas or other beans

### Simple Vinaigrette Dressing
- [ ] Olive Oil
- [ ] Vinegar (red wine, balsamic, or apple cider)
- [ ] Salt
- [ ] Black Pepper
